criteria.name: calibration_controls_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Heatmap cells, filters, threshold slider, Classify, Re-run, chart legend toggles, drawer chrome, Export, and Import are keyboard accessible with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, or Space and show a visible focus indicator; the slider responds to arrow keys
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Native buttons, heatmap cells, filters, and the slider are tabbable; a visible focus outline was observed. Evidence: calibration_controls_keyboard_accessible-shared.png

criteria.name: drawer_and_palette_manage_focus
criteria.description: The cell drawer traps focus while open, closes on Escape, and returns focus to the opening cell; the command palette and export drawer likewise return focus on dismiss
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Escape returned focus for the cell drawer, palette, and export drawer, but Tab escaped the open cell drawer to the offscreen CSV control instead of trapping focus. Evidence: drawer_and_palette_manage_focus-shared.png

criteria.name: icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Icon-only controls such as close, Export, and palette actions expose accessible names via aria-label or equivalent
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Icon-only toolbar, drawer-close, export, import, and palette controls expose aria-labels. Evidence: icons_have_accessible_names-shared.png

criteria.name: rollup_and_toasts_live_regions
criteria.description: Divergent rollup changes on threshold moves and classification/re-run feedback are conveyed visually and through a polite aria-live region
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Visual status content exists, but no aria-live, role=status, or role=alert region was observed for rollups or feedback. Evidence: calibration_controls_keyboard_accessible-shared.png

criteria.name: classification_fields_labeled
criteria.description: Classification form fields and Import paste controls have visible labels; validation messages name the fields they belong to
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Classification fields and JSON payload import have visible labels; validation text names classification and rationale. Evidence: classification_fields_labeled-shared.png

criteria.name: console_headings_logical_order
criteria.description: Headings for heatmap, variance, chart, timeline, and Export follow a logical order without skipping levels
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Observed heading order is h1, h2 for the active view/export, then h3 subsections without skipped levels. Evidence: calibration_controls_keyboard_accessible-shared.png

criteria.name: landmarks_for_console_regions
criteria.description: Primary regions such as the heatmap canvas, variance panel, and export drawer use landmark roles or skip-capable structure
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Heatmap and variance use named regions, and the export drawer uses role=dialog. Evidence: calibration_controls_keyboard_accessible-shared.png

criteria.name: ramp_and_chip_contrast
criteria.description: Cell score text keeps readable contrast against every red-amber-green ramp color, and chips/badges meet readable contrast
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Computed minimum score-text contrast was 11.05:1 and minimum chip/badge contrast was 4.88:1. Evidence: calibration_controls_keyboard_accessible-shared.png

criteria.name: semantic_roles_for_controls
criteria.description: Semantic controls and dialog/drawer roles are used for Classify, Re-run, Export, and the cell drawer rather than clickable bare divs alone
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Classify, Re-run, and Export are native buttons; cell and export drawers expose dialog roles. Evidence: drawer_and_palette_manage_focus-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_keeps_flows
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, animations are removed or shortened while re-run, triage, filters, Export, and Import remain complete
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Reduced motion was confirmed and transitions shortened to 1e-6s; re-run, triage, filter, and export completed, but Import was only opened, not completed end-to-end. Evidence: reduced_motion_keeps_flows-shared.png

criteria.name: in_memory_facets_reset_together
criteria.description: After classifying a row, moving the threshold, pinning a baseline, and opening Export, a page reload resets every facet together to the seeded grid, default threshold, no classifications, empty timeline, no baseline, and empty undo history — never a mix of surviving and reset facets
criteria.reasoning: Reload returned seeded means, σ 0.12, no classifications, empty timeline, no baseline, and no undo history together. Evidence: in_memory_facets_reset_together-reset.png

criteria.name: threshold_extremes_reclassify_live
criteria.description: Moving the sigma threshold to its maximum classifies all variance rows stable and to its minimum classifies all or nearly all divergent, with the divergent rollup matching visible chips — proving stability is derived live rather than from two hardcoded lists
criteria.reasoning: Real slider interaction changed σ from 0.40 with no divergent rows to 0.00 with all 12 divergent rows and matching rollup. Evidence: threshold_extremes_reclassify_live-low.png

criteria.name: export_json_tracks_threshold_and_triage
criteria.description: Changing the sigma threshold or saving a Classification changes the Export JSON sigmaThreshold and triage array in the same session without reload
criteria.reasoning: After UI changes, Export JSON visibly contained sigmaThreshold 0.12 and the newly saved capability-gap triage record. Evidence: export_json_tracks_threshold_and_triage-final.png

criteria.name: rerun_echoes_across_heatmap_variance_export
criteria.description: After a completed re-run, the heatmap cell mean, dependent variance coefficients, and Export JSON cells entry for that model and harness all reflect the new trials without reload
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A completed UI re-run updated the heatmap mean/trial count and Export JSON cell, but the observed dependent variance CV coefficients remained unchanged from their seeded values.

criteria.name: triage_summary_delta_exact
criteria.description: Measuring the matching triage summary total immediately before and after a valid Classification submit shows a delta of exactly one (or exact bulk count) with no off-by-one
criteria.reasoning: Measured immediately around a valid Temporal splice submission: Spec defect changed from 0 to 1 and Unclassified from 11 to 10, an exact delta of one. Evidence: different_classifications_different_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: different_classifications_different_badges
criteria.description: Submitting capability-gap versus spec-defect on otherwise identical valid rationales produces different row badges and increments different triage summary totals
criteria.reasoning: Counterfactual map showed a Capability gap badge and Temporal splice showed a Spec defect badge; summary totals incremented separately. Evidence: different_classifications_different_badges-shared.png

criteria.name: interleaved_rerun_and_triage_preserve_state
criteria.description: Starting a re-run on one cell, classifying a divergent row while it runs or after, and opening Export leaves both the timeline entry and the Classification badge intact without corrupting either flow
criteria.reasoning: During/after a real re-run, the heatmap showed the completed event and the main view retained both classification badges; Export JSON retained the triage records and timeline event.

criteria.name: filter_empty_then_restore_round_trip
criteria.description: Filtering until empty shows the empty state, then clear-filters restores the full heatmap and variance rows with coefficients and chips coherent again
criteria.reasoning: Typing a nonmatching model filter produced the explicit empty state with no variance rows; Clear filters restored all 12 rows with coefficients and chips. Evidence: filter_empty_then_restore_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: seeded_heatmap_grid
criteria.description: On load, the heatmap shows at least 6 fictional model rows by at least 4 fictional harness columns; every cell displays a mean score to 2 decimal places and a trial count, and cells are colored on a red to amber to green scale that visibly tracks the score
criteria.reasoning: Six model rows, four harness columns, two-decimal means, trial counts, and red/amber/green shading observed. Evidence: seeded-shared.png

criteria.name: cell_hover_tooltip_trials
criteria.description: Hovering a heatmap cell with the real pointer shows a tooltip listing that cell's per-trial rewards, and the listed rewards are consistent with the cell's displayed mean and trial count
criteria.reasoning: Hover tooltip listed per-trial rewards consistent with the displayed mean and count. Evidence: seeded-shared.png

criteria.name: cell_click_opens_drawer
criteria.description: Clicking a heatmap cell opens a drawer showing the model and harness names, a trial list with trial id, reward, runtime, and cost per row, and a mini distribution chart of the rewards; the drawer closes from its close control and by clicking outside it
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Drawer opened with required details and close control, but outside-click closure was not observed. Evidence: cell-drawer-shared.png

criteria.name: variance_rows_with_cv
criteria.description: The variance view lists per-task rows showing task name, category, per-harness mean scores, and a coefficient of variation to 2 decimal places, each carrying a stable or divergent classification chip relative to the displayed sigma threshold
criteria.reasoning: Variance rows showed task, category, harness means, two-decimal CV, and stable/divergent chips. Evidence: variance-shared.png

criteria.name: threshold_slider_reclassifies_live
criteria.description: Scripted probe: record the divergent rollup, move the threshold slider down until at least one stable row turns divergent, and confirm the chip flips and the rollup increments in the same interaction with no reload; moving the slider back restores the prior classification and rollup
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Slider movement was observed, but the complete down/restore classification workflow was not fully verified. Evidence: variance-shared.png

criteria.name: slider_extremes_consistent
criteria.description: At the slider maximum all rows classify stable, at the minimum all or nearly all classify divergent, and at every tested position the divergent rollup equals the number of visible divergent chips
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Maximum showed 2 divergent rows and minimum showed 5, so minimum was not all or nearly all divergent. Evidence: variance-shared.png

criteria.name: classification_field_contract_validation
criteria.description: The Classify form validates the Classification field contract: classification must be exactly capability-gap or spec-defect and rationale a trimmed string of at least 15 and at most 500 characters; a too-short rationale or out-of-enum classification shows an inline message naming the offending field, submit stays disabled until valid, and an invalid submission changes no triage total
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Empty rationale and missing classification messages appeared, but the submit control remained enabled. Evidence: classify-invalid-shared.png

criteria.name: triage_badges_and_summary
criteria.description: Submitting a valid classification badges the row with the chosen classification and increments the matching triage summary total (capability-gap, spec-defect, unclassified divergent); the three totals always sum to the current divergent count
criteria.reasoning: Valid classification added a row badge and changed totals from 0/0/6 to 1/0/5. Evidence: classified-shared.png

criteria.name: reclassify_moves_between_totals
criteria.description: Reclassifying an already-classified row from capability-gap to spec-defect moves it between the two totals (one decrements, the other increments) rather than double-counting
criteria.reasoning: Reclassifying the same row changed totals from capability-gap 1/spec-defect 0 to capability-gap 0/spec-defect 1. Evidence: classified-shared.png

criteria.name: filters_narrow_both_views
criteria.description: Applying a harness filter removes that harness column from the heatmap and removes its scores from every variance coefficient computation in the same interaction; model and task-category filters likewise narrow both views, and clearing filters restores the full grid and rows exactly
criteria.reasoning: Harness filtering removed the harness column and reduced variance computation to one harness; clearing restored the full dataset. Evidence: filtered-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_state_on_no_match
criteria.description: When filters combine to match nothing, the heatmap and variance regions each show a designed empty state with a clear-filters control that restores the data, rather than a blank or broken area
criteria.reasoning: No-match filtering showed designed empty states and clear-filters controls for the heatmap and variance areas. Evidence: empty-filter-shared.png

criteria.name: rerun_status_progression
criteria.description: Starting a cell Re-run walks the visible statuses queued, then running with a progress list showing one line per trial that ticks complete as each simulated trial finishes, then complete; while running, the cell shows an in-progress indicator and a loading affordance appears wherever that cell's data is shown
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Queued and complete states plus disabled Re-run were observed, but the running state was not captured. Evidence: rerun-complete-shared.png

criteria.name: rerun_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Scripted probe: record a cell's mean score and trial count, run a re-run to completion, and confirm the cell's score and trial count changed, the hover tooltip lists the new per-trial rewards, the drawer trial list shows the new trials, and every variance row including that model and harness recomputed its coefficient and classification coherently
criteria.reasoning: Completed reruns changed means/trial counts, refreshed drawer trials, timeline, and exported variance/cell data. Evidence: rerun-complete-shared.png

criteria.name: rerun_timeline_appends
criteria.description: Each completed re-run appends exactly one entry to the event timeline, newest first, showing a timestamp, model, harness, and resulting mean
criteria.reasoning: Timeline showed newest-first entries with timestamp, model, harness, and resulting mean. Evidence: timeline-shared.png

criteria.name: rerun_double_activation_single_run
criteria.description: Starting a re-run disables that cell's Re-run control until completion; double-activating it starts exactly one run and appends exactly one timeline entry
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Double activation was not directly exercised as a controlled before/after test. Evidence: rerun-complete-shared.png

criteria.name: chart_model_selector_redraws
criteria.description: The chart panel renders grouped bars of score by harness for the selected model, and changing the model selector redraws the bars with values matching that model's heatmap row
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Chart rendered, but changing the model selector did not visibly change the selected model. Evidence: chart-shared.png

criteria.name: chart_series_toggle_and_tooltip
criteria.description: Toggling a harness series off from the chart legend removes its bars and toggling it back restores them; hovering a bar with the real pointer shows a tooltip with the harness name and score; toggling every series off shows a designed empty-chart message
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Harness-series toggling and bar hover tooltip workflow was not completed. Evidence: chart-shared.png

criteria.name: cancel_leaves_triage_unchanged
criteria.description: Using Cancel on the Classify form leaves the row's chip, any existing badge, and all triage summary totals unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Canceling a classification form left the row unbadged and summary totals unchanged. Evidence: classify-invalid-shared.png

criteria.name: reload_resets_to_seed
criteria.description: After re-running a cell, classifying a row, and moving the threshold, a page reload returns the app to its seeded state: the seeded grid values, default threshold, no classifications, and an empty re-run timeline
criteria.reasoning: Reload restored seeded 0.84/3-trial values, default state, no classifications, and Events 0. Evidence: reload-reset-shared.png

criteria.name: baseline_pin_shows_signed_deltas
criteria.description: Pin baseline captures current per-cell means; after a completed re-run that changes a cell mean, that cell shows a signed delta to 2 decimal places beside the live mean; Clear baseline removes every delta readout in the same interaction
criteria.reasoning: Pinning baseline, rerunning, and closing the drawer showed a signed +0.03 delta; clearing removed it. Evidence: reload-reset-shared.png

criteria.name: bulk_triage_applies_classification_contract
criteria.description: Selecting two or more divergent rows reveals Apply classification; submitting a valid Classification payload badges every selected row and shifts triage summary totals by exactly that count without double-counting; stable rows cannot be selected
criteria.reasoning: Two divergent rows were selected, bulk classification applied both badges, and totals became 2 capability-gap/4 unclassified; stable rows had no selectors. Evidence: variance-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_classification_and_threshold
criteria.description: Undo reverses the most recent threshold move or classification (single or bulk) and restores chips, badges, and triage summary totals exactly; Redo reapplies that edit; both controls are disabled when their stack is empty
criteria.reasoning: Undo restored the pre-bulk totals and Redo restored the 2 classified totals. Evidence: variance-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_opens_export
criteria.description: Pressing Control-K or Command-K opens a command palette listing at least heatmap, variance, chart, timeline, and export; choosing export opens the export drawer and closes the palette; Escape closes the palette without changing state
criteria.reasoning: Control-K opened the palette with required commands; selecting export closed the palette and opened the export drawer. Evidence: palette-shared.png

criteria.name: calibration_pack_json_field_contract
criteria.description: After opening Export, the JSON tab preview is a CalibrationPack object showing required keys schemaVersion (integer 1), document (meridian-calibration), sigmaThreshold, models, harnesses, cells, varianceRows, timeline, baseline, filters, and triage, with nested Classification payloads under triage matching the Classification field contract
criteria.reasoning: JSON preview parsed as schemaVersion 1 meridian-calibration with all required top-level keys and valid triage payloads. Evidence: export-csv-shared.png

criteria.name: variance_csv_field_contract
criteria.description: The CSV tab preview begins with a header naming task, category, one column per current harness, coefficientOfVariation, stability, and classification, followed by one line per variance task whose classification cell is empty or exactly capability-gap or spec-defect
criteria.reasoning: CSV preview had the required header and one row per variance task with valid classification values. Evidence: export-csv-shared.png

criteria.name: export_reflects_session_mutations
criteria.description: Scripted probe: classify a divergent row, complete a re-run, move the threshold, open Export, and confirm the JSON triage array includes the new Classification, cells reflect the updated mean and trial rewards, and sigmaThreshold equals the live slider — Copy shows a brief copied confirmation and Download triggers a real file download
criteria.reasoning: Export reflected rerun means/trials and triage; Copy showed COPIED JSON and Download produced meridian-calibration.json. Evidence: export-csv-shared.png

criteria.name: import_calibration_pack_round_trip
criteria.description: After classifying at least two divergent rows, export CalibrationPack JSON, reload to seeded state, restore the divergent set with the threshold if needed, import that JSON, and confirm the same badges and triage summary totals return
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Full export, reload, restore-divergent-set, and calibration-pack re-import round trip was not completed. Evidence: export-csv-shared.png

criteria.name: import_rejects_invalid_field_contract
criteria.description: Importing unparseable JSON, schemaVersion not 1, document outside meridian-triage or meridian-calibration, missing entries/triage, or a Classification entry that breaks the Classification field contract shows an inline error naming the offending field and leaves badges and summary totals unchanged
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: schemaVersion 2 was rejected with an inline schemaVersion error and totals stayed unchanged, but all required invalid-input variants were not exercised. Evidence: classify-invalid-shared.png

criteria.name: classification_task_and_rationale_bounds
criteria.description: In both single-row and bulk Classify forms, the would-be Classification request body uses the selected variance-row task as a trimmed non-empty task no longer than 80 characters and a trimmed rationale from 15 through 500 characters; empty or over-80 task and whitespace-only, under-15, or over-500 rationale show inline errors naming the field and apply no badge or summary change.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Complete task-length and rationale-bound tests for both single and bulk forms were not completed. Evidence: classify-invalid-shared.png

criteria.name: repin_baseline_replaces_prior_snapshot
criteria.description: Pin a baseline, complete a re-run so one or more signed deltas appear, then activate Pin baseline again: the prior snapshot is replaced by the current per-cell means and every delta is recalculated from the replacement baseline, with unchanged current means reading zero or showing no delta.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Replacement pin after a rerun was not directly verified for recalculated zero deltas. Evidence: reload-reset-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_baseline_pin_and_clear
criteria.description: After Pin baseline, Clear baseline, or replacement pin through the visible controls, Undo restores the exact preceding baseline snapshot and signed two-decimal delta readouts, and Redo reapplies the pin or clear across every heatmap cell.
criteria.reasoning: Undo restored the pinned baseline and +0.03 delta after Clear baseline; Redo cleared the delta again. Evidence: reload-reset-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_search_and_actions
criteria.description: Opening the command palette lists heatmap, variance, chart, timeline, export, filter-clear, and pin-baseline; typing a partial command narrows the list to matching labels, choosing filter-clear clears active filters, choosing pin-baseline captures the current means, and each chosen action closes the palette without navigation.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Partial search and pin-baseline were observed, but filter-clear action was not completed and verified. Evidence: palette-shared.png

criteria.name: calibration_pack_nested_field_contract
criteria.description: The CalibrationPack JSON preview's cells objects visibly include model, harness, numeric mean, non-negative integer trialCount, and trials with id/reward/runtime/cost; varianceRows include task/category, per-harness means, numeric coefficientOfVariation, stable|divergent stability, and null-or-valid Classification triage; timeline entries include timestamp/model/harness/mean; baseline is null or cells of model/harness/mean; filters contains model/harness/taskCategory arrays; and triage contains every current valid Classification.
criteria.reasoning: Parsed JSON visibly contained valid cells/trials, variance rows, timeline entries, null baseline, filter arrays, and valid triage entries. Evidence: export-csv-shared.png

criteria.name: valid_triage_pack_import_is_undoable
criteria.description: Importing a valid TriagePack with schemaVersion 1, document meridian-triage, and entries containing valid Classification payloads applies those entries only to matching divergent rows, updates badges and all triage summary totals, and one Undo restores the exact pre-import badges and totals.
criteria.reasoning: Valid meridian-triage import changed two rows to spec-defect and totals to 0/2/4; Undo restored 2/0/4. Evidence: variance-shared.png
